title: Mattock
description: A balanced and vanilla-friendly multi-tool for Minecraft
body:
The Mattock is a balanced multi-tool that can mine any block at a reasonable speed, but cannot be enchanted with efficiency. It's a jack of all trades tool that doesn't outclass the existing tools.

This is mostly for builders who don't want to switch between several tools while they're building.

It is crafted with obsidian.

![The Mattock crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/625c9d46e3066700d53a9b0a32bac4016a51a4f7.png)

Special thanks to edmord for the texture.
